Control Name: Inventory of information and other associated assets
Control Description: An inventory of information and other associated assets including owners shall be developed and maintained
Evidence: Asset inventory database or register; Asset classification records; Asset ownership documentation; Asset lifecycle records; Configuration management database (CMDB); Asset disposal records

Control Description: Personnel and other interested parties as appropriate shall return all the organization's assets in their possession upon change or termination of their employment contract or agreement
Evidence: Asset return checklists; Termination procedures including asset return; Asset return receipts and acknowledgments; Exit interview records; Access revocation logs; Asset reconciliation reports

Control Description: An appropriate set of procedures for information labelling shall be developed and implemented in accordance with the information classification scheme adopted by the organization
Evidence: Labeling procedures and standards; Examples of physical and electronic labels; Labeling tools configuration; Compliance monitoring reports; Training materials on labeling; Audit reports on labeling compliance

Control Description: Rules to control physical and logical access to information and other associated assets shall be established and implemented based on business and information security requirements
Evidence: Access control policy; Access control lists (ACLs); User access matrices; Authentication system configurations; Access review reports; Privileged access management records

Control Description: Access rights to information and other associated assets shall be provisioned removed and reviewed in accordance with the organization's topic-specific policy on and procedures for access control
Evidence: Access provisioning procedures; Access request and approval records; Access review reports (periodic); Access revocation logs; Role-based access control documentation; Segregation of duties matrix

Control Name: Monitoring review and change management of supplier services
Control Description: The organization shall regularly monitor review audit and manage changes to supplier's information security practices and service delivery
Evidence: Supplier monitoring reports; Service delivery reviews; Third-party audit reports; Change request documentation; Performance metrics and KPIs; Supplier scorecard reports

Control Name: Compliance with policies and standards for information security
Control Description: Compliance with the organization's information security policy topic-specific policies rules and standards shall be regularly reviewed
Evidence: Compliance monitoring reports; Policy exception logs and approvals; Self-assessment questionnaires; Compliance dashboards and metrics; Non-compliance incident reports; Remediation tracking documentation

Control Description: Access to information and other associated assets shall be restricted in accordance with the established topic-specific policy on access control
Evidence: Access control implementation documentation; Role-based access control (RBAC) configurations; Access control lists (ACLs); Data access audit logs; Access violation reports; Need-to-know access documentation

Control Description: Configurations including security configurations of hardware software services and networks shall be established documented implemented monitored and reviewed
Evidence: Configuration management policy; Configuration baselines and standards; Configuration management database (CMDB); Change control records; Configuration audit reports; Unauthorized change detection logs

Control Description: Changes to information processing facilities and information systems shall be subject to change management procedures
Evidence: Change management policy and procedures; Change advisory board (CAB) records; Change request documentation; Change impact assessments; Change implementation logs; Post-implementation reviews
